hero.name: Varun Gupta
hero.headline: Decoding the Timeless Wisdom of the Mahabharata for Modern Minds
hero.tagline: Bridging ancient Indian philosophy with contemporary research through scholarly analysis, publications, and global discourse on the world's greatest epic.

researchFocus.sectionTitle: Exploring the Mahabharata Through Scholarly Inquiry

items.title: Textual Analysis & Critical Edition Studies
items.description: Examining variant manuscripts and critical editions of the Mahabharata to trace its evolution across centuries and regional traditions.

items.title: Philosophical Frameworks in the Epic
items.description: Analyzing the philosophical underpinnings of the Mahabharata including dharma, karma, and moksha as presented through its narrative and dialogues.

items.title: Historical Context & Chronology
items.description: Investigating the historical and archaeological correlates of the Mahabharata narrative to establish chronological frameworks.

items.title: Contemporary Relevance & Application
items.description: Drawing parallels between the epic's dilemmas and modern-day ethical challenges in leadership, governance, and personal conduct.

featuredContent.description: Selected scholarly works and articles that represent the core of my research on the Mahabharata.

items.title: The Concept of Dharma in the Mahabharata: A Critical Re-examination
Women in the Mahabharata: Beyond the Silences
Geographical Correlates of the Mahabharata: A Multi-disciplinary Approach

latestVideos.description: Lectures, talks, and discussions on Mahabharata scholarship.

items.title: The Mahabharata War: Myth or Reality?
Understanding Dharma: Lessons from the Mahabharata
The Women of the Mahabharata: Draupadi, Kunti, and Gandhari

newsletterCta.title: Stay Connected with Mahabharata Scholarship
newsletterCta.description: Subscribe to receive updates on new research, publications, speaking engagements, and exclusive content delivered to your inbox.

items.title: The Mahabharata: A Modern Reader's Companion
items.description: A comprehensive guide to navigating the epic's narrative, characters, and philosophical themes for contemporary readers.

items.title: Dharma in Dialogue: Ethical Frameworks from the Mahabharata
items.description: An exploration of the ethical debates embedded within the Mahabharata and their relevance to modern moral philosophy.

speakingMedia.description: Conference keynotes, university lectures, podcast interviews, and media features.

items.title: Keynote: The Mahabharata in the 21st Century
items.event: International Conference on Epic Studies, Oxford University

items.title: Lecture Series: Philosophy of the Mahabharata
items.event: Department of Sanskrit, University of Delhi

seo.title: Varun Gupta | Mahabharata Researcher, Author & Speaker
seo.description: Explore the scholarly work of Varun Gupta on the Mahabharata — research papers, books, lectures, and articles decoding the timeless wisdom of the epic for modern minds.
